_comment: Pinned reference values for NEAR AI Cloud TEE backends (mainnet). The Base on-chain DstackKms/DstackApp registries are the authoritative SET of permitted (compose_hash, os_image_hash, app_id, kms_pubkey) — `cast logs --address $APP 'ComposeHashAdded(bytes32)' --rpc-url https://mainnet.base.org` enumerates them. CT-style anchoring: each on-chain-authorized compose_hash is admitted to this file only after we capture and audit its `app_compose` preimage from a live attestation (so the anchor is `on-chain authorized AND preimage-reviewed`). inner_yaml pins Block C (the inner YAML in `nearai/cvm-compose-files` is fetched at runtime by compose-manager and NOT in the outer compose_hash measurement; without this pin the operator can swap the inner YAML and exfiltrate prompts on the same KMS-derived signing key). Refresh on operator rotation by sweeping new `ComposeHashAdded` events on Base + capturing the preimage from a live `/v1/attestation/report`. Source captures: case-studies/near-ai-private-inference/sources/.

_pending_review._note: On-chain ComposeHashAdded events on the near-ai/models DstackApp 0x2c0a0c96cb6dbd659bf1446e2f3fce58172ff91b that we are NOT yet admitting because no live attestation has surfaced the preimage. CT-style: chain-authorized ≠ anchored — we still need to capture and diff `app_compose` from a live /v1/attestation/report before adding. Sweep source: probes/onchain_sweep.py in amiller/awesome-private-inference (data/onchain-status.json).

compose_hashes.notes: Admitted on-chain ~7 minutes after the gpt-oss-anchored 0x95cbf0a8 in the same block range — likely a staged rotation for the small-models.yaml host. Live 2026-05-18 capture of openai/gpt-oss-120b and Qwen/Qwen3-30B still returned 0x95cbf0a8, so this revision is not in active rotation yet.
Live 2026-05-18 capture across GLM-5/GLM-5.1-FP8/gpt-oss-120b/Qwen3-30B/DeepSeek-V3.1 did not surface this compose — staged but not in active rotation. Admit after capturing preimage.

zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8._note: Three on-chain-authorized outer compose_hashes for the GLM-app DstackApp 0x2c0a0c96cb6dbd659bf1446e2f3fce58172ff91b, all signed by the EOA owner 0x21e6b7eF11185eaa57c56Ea9c74E48aAc6e8AB8d. ComposeHashAdded events at blocks 43883122 (0x242a6272, 2026-03-26), 44791240 (0x700adbf5, 2026-04-16), 45208404 (0x40919398, 2026-04-26). Preimage diff 0x242a6272 → 0x40919398 = compose-manager image bump (a3c6e223 → f561539a) + privilege escalation (pid: host, cap_add: SYS_ADMIN) so compose-manager can nsenter+systemctl to manage CVM host services via /dstack-agent/:action — documented in the YAML comment. We accept all three; refuse anything else until on-chain + preimage-audited.

deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1._status: Model substitution still observed 2026-05-18 (initial detection 2026-05-05; previously confirmed 2026-05-09): requesting deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3.1 returns model_name=Qwen/Qwen3.5-122B-A10B (file=Qwen3.5-122B.yaml). Filed nearai/cloud-api#573. Hermes' model_name check fails closed on this regardless of which compose_hash the substituted backend reports. inner_yaml left empty until DeepSeek-V3.1 is restored to its own backend.

openai/gpt-oss-120b._note: Inner YAML small-models.yaml hosts gpt-oss-120b alongside qwen3-30b/qwen3-vl/qwen3-embeddings/qwen3-reranker/whisper3-large/flux. Each model gets its own vllm-proxy-* service in one CVM, MODEL_NAME env per service drives KMS-derived signing key. New compose_hash 0x95cbf0a8 admitted 2026-05-09 — added on-chain at block from tx 0x241f819ca10b on 2026-05-08T12:22:07Z; preimage diff vs 0x242a6272 = pre_launch_script gains kernel-tuning lines (vm.swappiness=0, vm.dirty_ratio=5, etc.) for inference workloads. compose-manager image @sha256:f561539a unchanged; allowed_envs unchanged. Benign perf tuning, off the prompt path. 2026-05-18 inner_yaml refresh: admit commit 0x64fff09a (live-served). Diff vs anchored 0xe59f9a29 spans 13 commits — all sampling/parser/GPU-rebalance config + adds Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-FP8 and gemma-4-31B-it services on the existing vllm/vllm-openai@sha256:518c1d… (v0.20.2-cu129-ubuntu2404) image + the qwen3.6 fp8-kv-cache toggle dance (ce3c022 adds → 64fff09a reverts due to qwen3_5_moe dequant overhead). PROXY_TOKEN already in outer allowed_envs; no new mounts, privs or env_keys; image pinned by digest.
